sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96727" key="sthmoni/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στημον-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<sense id="n96727.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στήμων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ς. κίκιννος</foreign> a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thread-like</tr_> curl, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:353" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">353</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
